shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200
find pages components styles -maxdepth 3 -type f -print -exec sed -n '1,240p' {} \;

cat package.json && printf '
--- tsconfig ---
' && cat tsconfig.json && printf '
--- next config ---
' && cat next.config.ts && printf '
--- agents ---
' && cat AGENTS.md
find app components styles -type f -print | sort; test ! -d pages && echo 'pages removed'
npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build >/tmp/next-build.log && tail -30 /tmp/next-build.log

rm -f components/AppProvider.js tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
find . -maxdepth 2 -type f -not -path './node_modules/*' -not -path './.next/*' -print | sort
printf '\nRemaining legacy references:\n'
grep -R -E "next/router|next/head|next/document|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|getServerSideProps|pages/" -n --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next --exclude=tsconfig.tsbuildinfo . || true
npx tsc --noEmit
